creator: Martin.Cracauer@cons.org
text:
I uploaded a new FreeBSD port for scsh - The Scheme Shell.

This is my first port and I plan to contribute a larger number of
others. I tried very hard to make it good. I appreciate feedback in
case of any slitch. I know we are all short of time, but every second
you spend on feedback on this one will save us all more time later ;-)

But it is not neccessary to send me changes you make to integrate the
port, I am following the current CVS tree.

The port has been tested on 2.1.5, 2.2-alpha, 3.0-current (state mid
of november). The only problem is that 2.1.5 cannot remove the
compressed manpage on 2.1.5.

I uploaded the port to:
ftp://freefall.freebsd.org/incoming/scsh-0.4.4.freebsd-port-A.tar.gz
http://www-intern.bik-gmbh.de/tmp/scsh-0.4.4.freebsd-port-A.tar.gz
